title: product-file
description: One JSON file per fencing product variant (e.g. qshs.json, vs.json). Groups all table rows the variant owns under table-name keys. Gates live inside their parent fencing variant's file. The Node upserter at supabase/seeds/tools/seed-products.js reads files matching this schema and upserts each section in dependency order (products → product_components → rule_sets → rule_versions → engine rows → pricing_rules).

org_slug.description: Business key for the owning organisation. Applied to every row in this file — do NOT repeat org_slug on individual rows.
